li.label: Divine Grace
li.description: The heavens look down upon me and our congregation with immense satisfaction. I feel a profound warmth.

li.label: Sorrow of the Faithful
li.description: I feel the grace of my deity, but the unpious nature of those around me stains this land. The god's patience is wearing thin.

li.label: Divine Wrath
li.description: A terrible chill grips my spine. I have utterly failed my creator, and their unseen anger weighs heavy on my soul.
